description: Identify the target junction ID from /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/junction_briefing.txt and create an XML node patch at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/patch.nod.xml to change the junction to an all-way stop. Apply this patch to the base network pasubio_buslanes.net.xml to produce a new network file named pasubio_allway.net.xml. Create a SUMO configuration file at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run_allway.sumocfg that references the updated network and saves trip information to tripinfos_allway.xml, then run the simulation to completion.
